name: Ronald Hove

education.title: Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Computer Science and Information Systems

about:
Hi 👋🏾, I'm a computer scientist passionate about solving complex problems and building Industry-leading applications. I thrive in solo work, teamwork, or leadership roles, blending my technical skills with product management and customer engagement.

My skill-set is rooted in software engineering, systems architecture, API, and database design. I've worked extensively with cloud systems 🌥️ and AI 🤖.

Evolving and always eager to innovate. I'm on a mission to make technology fun and impactful 🚀.

#BuildingInAfrica 🏗️ 🌍
